ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label representing the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, etc.) */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Measurement standard used for the size (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Age or numerical range associated with the size */,
  "size_status" TEXT /* Status of the size (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the category ID */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the label ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES size_labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the size ID */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement size in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement size in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement size in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement size in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement size in inches */,
  "pant_length" REAL /* Pant length measurement size in inches */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "collection_category" TEXT /* Category of the collection (e.g., women's, men's, kids', accessories) */,
  "collection_season" TEXT /* Season or occasion associated with the collection (e.g., spring, summer, holiday) */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the theme ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_collections_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES collection_themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_sizes" (
  "collection_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection-size relationship */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the collection ID */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the size ID */,
  "collection_size_status" TEXT /* Status of the size within the collection (e.g., available, discontinued, upcoming) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_sizes_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES size_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, retailer, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the size ID */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the measurement ID */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement change was made */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the size ID */,
  "sales_data" INTEGER /* Sales data for the size (number of units sold) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was recorded */,
  "trend_category" TEXT /* Category of the trend (e.g., sales, customer feedback, market research) */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., internal sales, customer surveys, market reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size guide */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the size ID */,
  "fit_description" TEXT /* Description of the fit characteristics for the size */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit associated with the size guide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guides_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for measurement standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement standard (e.g., US, EU) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the measurement standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standard_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the size ID */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the standard ID */,
  "mapping_description" TEXT /* Description of the size-standard mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standard_mapping_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES measurements_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standard_mapping_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "label_description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "theme_description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)
